assumptions: The question concerns consolidated financial statements.
The intragroup dividend receivable gives rise to a foreign currency exposure.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value hedge accounting as a top-level hedge accounting model for recognised assets or liabilities and components of such items.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies cash flow hedge accounting as a top-level hedge accounting model for variability in cash flows of recognised items or highly probable forecast transactions.

approaches.label: Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 and IFRIC 16 identify hedge accounting for foreign currency risk of a net investment in a foreign operation as a distinct top-level hedge accounting model.
